leadText: If you were looking for the location within Castelia City, see Castelia City → Central Plaza. The Central Plaza (Japanese: センタースクエア Center Square) is a large plaza in the center of the Terarium, located within Blueberry Academy in the Unova region.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] This section is a stub . You can help Bulbapedia by expanding it .

sections.text: Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Vending machines [ edit | edit source ] Four vending machines can be found throughout the Central Plaza.
